productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Denim Co. Men Red Polo T-Shirt
description: Red knitted polo T-shirt, has a ribbed polo collar, a short button placket on the front, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs and printed detail on the right, a brand applique on the left side of the chest, printed detail on the front, vented hems with the back hem longer than the front
